mapper.sql: SELECT r.*, a.name AS athlete_name, a.student_no AS athlete_student_no, a.gender AS athlete_gender, d.name AS dept_name, e.name AS event_name, e.category AS event_category FROM registration r LEFT JOIN athlete a ON r.athlete_id = a.id LEFT JOIN department d ON a.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN event e ON r.event_id = e.id
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM registration WHERE athlete_id = #{athleteId} AND event_id = #{eventId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registration (athlete_id, event_id, status) VALUES (#{athleteId}, #{eventId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE registration SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE registration SET status=#{status} WHERE event_id=#{eventId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration WHERE event_id = #{eventId}
